source_intent.raw_intent: Case 012: I am a developer in United States. Build a compliance_evidence_prompt for research_agent using the market_lens. Chaos input type is unsupported_roi_claim. The source is intentionally messy: mix missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Block unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt. Return something SR8 can compile into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.

parsed_tester_json.blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot compile a valid compliance evidence prompt without resolving these defects. A repair receipt is required before proceeding.
parsed_tester_json.compiled_intent: Objective: Block compilation due to unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt for DSS-012. Scope: - Identify and document all defects in raw_intent: unsupported_roi_claim, missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, ambiguous acceptance criteria. No compliance evidence prompt will be generated. Constraints: - Must not produce a compliance_evidence_prompt until all defects are resolved. - Must output a repair receipt with actionable steps. - Must adhere to SR8 sovereign core validation rules. Success Criteria: - should_block is true. - blocked_reason clearly explains the blocker. - Repair receipt is recorded in the output. Output Contract: - artifact_type: compliance_evidence_prompt - depth_tier: D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE - runtime_target: Codex - should_block: True - blocked_reason: Unsafe certainty: raw_intent contains unsupported_roi_claim with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria. Cannot compile a valid compliance evidence prompt without resolving these defects. A repair receipt is required before proceeding. - compiled_intent: Block compilation due to unsafe certainty and record a repair receipt for DSS-012.
